title: NAVIGATION CENTER - 211info
text: COMPASS OUTREACH NAVIGATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Partners with local churches to provide hot lunches and a bi-monthly medical clinic. Other services include case management, hygiene supplies, temporary mailing address, and phone messaging. Replacement ID services are available in exchange for volunteer service. Tents, tarps, and blankets offered when available and in exchange for volunteer service (can be waived if needed). Bus passes are available for court or parole meetings in Coquille. Local bus passes are available on a case-by-case basis. 1200 Newmark Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: -Unrestricted; priority is given to people experiencing homelessness with mental health conditions -Bus passes: Local transportation to Coquille for court or parole meetings. Must show summons or ticket. -Local bus passes on a case-by-case basis -Volunteer time may be requested for high-demand or limited-availability items, on a case-by-case basis. Hours: Monday/Wednesday 11am-12:30pm at Gloria Dei Lutheran Church, 1290 Thompson Road Coos Bay, OR 97240 Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 11am-12:30pm at Harmony Methodist Church, 123 Ocean Boulevard SE, Coos Bay, OR 97420 Email (541) 888-3202 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 888-3202 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for meals. Call for an appointment for all other services. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across from the Y Marina on Newmark in the Empire District. Stop on the CCAT West Loop. Services: Camping Gear * Homelessness Issues Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Community Meals * Homelessness Issues Community Voicemail * Homelessness Issues General Medical Care * Homelessness Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homelessness Issues Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Temporary Mailing Address * Homelessness Issues Transportation Passes * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COLD WEATHER SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMPASS OUTREACH
